function: async () => { const out = {}; const fileInput = document.getElementById('modalRefUpload'); out.fileInputExists = !!fileInput; out.fileInputType = fileInput ? fileInput.type : null; out.fileInputAccept = fileInput ? fileInput.accept : null; out.fileInputVisible = fileInput ? (fileInput.offsetParent !== null) : null; out.modalProfileFormVisible = document.getElementById('modalProfileForm') ? !document.getElementById('modalProfileForm').classList.contains('hidden') : null; const preview = document.getElementById('modalRefPreview'); out.previewExists = !!preview; out.previewClasses = preview ? preview.className : null; const removeBtn = document.getElementById('btnRefRemove'); out.removeBtnExists = !!removeBtn; return out; }
